{{Infobox character
| name = Teach
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|enhancements}}{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|, shoulder-tackle}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Guild Head of the Imperial Guard, General}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Imperial Guard]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|guard}}{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|, General}}
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]]
}}

''See also: [[Teach Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[General Teach]] is a high-ranking military leader within the [[Imperial Guard]] who serves [[the Emperor]] with unwavering loyalty. Clad in red-and-black plating, she wields a [[sword]] known as [[Tyrfang]], an intimidating weapon that projects visions of death and causes the surrounding earth to die. Her combat prowess is significant, though she has undergone a transformation into a purple-and-blue form. Teach is characterized by her disciplined, rigid posture and an intense, penetrating gaze used to intimidate others or scan for threats. While she is a stern figure who avoids compliments and maintains strict authority over her subordinates, she has shown rare moments of empathy, such as offering comfort to those facing execution. Throughout her career, Teach has risen through the ranks by suppressing rebellions, a history of violence that continues to haunt her. She is deeply committed to the stability of the [[Empire]] and views the presence of an [[Emperor]] as essential to preventing anarchy. Her dedication is so profound that she has expressed a willingness to die to signal the loss of [[the Emperor]]'s sanity. In political matters, she advocates for unity and has worked to endorse [[Calder Marten]] for the throne to ensure a cohesive imperial future. She is also accompanied by a [[Kameira]], a creature with glittering scales.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Teach]] states that without an [[Emperor]], the [[Imperial Guard]] will fall apart.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Teach]] is a character who spoke about announcing an [[Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Teach]] had a confrontation in the room around the [[Optasia]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c16">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Teach]] has enhancements.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[Teach]] was losing a fight against [[Jorin]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c20" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|As a member of the [[Imperial Guard]], Teach serves as both a General and the [[Guild Head]]. She has undergone a significant transformation by replacing her own heart with that of a [[Bonereaver]]. Following these developments, she prepares to go on a journey to meet with [[the Emperor]].}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Teach]] is the [[Guild]] [[Head of the Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Teach]] is a General in the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Teach]] replaced her own heart with the heart of a [[Bonereaver]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Teach]] is a member of the [[Imperial Guard]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Teach]] is going to meet [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c16">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|A General described as being nothing more than an animal, Teach is characterized by her silver-and-blue eyes and a tendency to glare at [[Calder]]. During the negotiations, she sat on one side of [[Calder]] while carrying her weapon, [[Tyrfang]], and even performed a shoulder-tackle on [[Estyr]]. While hosting a party, she later used [[Tyrfang]] to defend [[the Emperor]] by pumping power from her [[Vessel]] into the blade. Although her hair was burned away completely after she took a blow from [[Jorin]], Teach remained a formidable force who personally executed [[Calder]]'s father.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Teach]] is described as being just an animal.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Teach]] is a General.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Teach]] is a character who glares at [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c2">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Teach]] is going to throw a party.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c4">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Teach]] carries a weapon called [[Tyrfang]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Teach]] is sitting on one side of [[Calder]] in the negotiation.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Teach]] performed a shoulder-tackle on [[Estyr]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Teach]] used [[Tyrfang]] to defend [[the Emperor]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Teach]] pumped power from her [[Vessel]] into [[Tyrfang]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Teach]]'s hair was burned away completely after taking [[Jorin]]'s blow.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Teach]] has silver-and-blue eyes.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Teach]] personally executed [[Calder]]'s father.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c23" />}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Teach]] is considered dangerous even without his [[Vessel]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Teach]] is a guard flanking [[Calder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c6">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Teach]] leaped after [[Estyr Six]] and [[Kern]] while wielding [[Tyrfang]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c8">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|“Without an Emperor, the Imperial Guard will eventually fall apart.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|"Then we should announce an Emperor as soon as possible," Teach said firmly.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c8" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Imperial Guard]]
[[Category:Soldiers]]
